verses.text: Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a
“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, gam khatpeuhah gal ka tun'sak ciangin a thupiangteng na mipihte tungah gen in. Tua galtun'na ding gammite in amaute lak panin galvil dingin mi khat seh uh hi
Galvilpa in galte hong pai a muh ciangin mi khempeuh a theihsakna dingin pataukohna peengkul tum hi
Mi khatpeuh in tua pataukohna za napi-in donloin a ommawk a, a galte hong pai-in tua mipa a thah leh, ama sihna pen amahmah ngawh ding ahi hi
Amah in pataukohna za napi-in donlo ahih manin, ama sihna pen ama khialhna hang ahi hi. Thudon hi leh amah a suakta ding ahi hi
Ahi zongin galvilpa in galte hong pai mu napi-in pataukohna peengkul a tum kei a, galte hong pai-in mi a thah leh, tua a site amau' mawhna hangin a si hita se leh galvilpa ka ngawh ding hi
“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, tu-in Israel minam khempeuhte' galvilpa dingin nang kong koih hi. Nang tungah kong piak hilhkholhna khempeuh amaute tungah na gensawn ding hi
Migilopa khat pen si ding hi, ci-in kong gen ciangin amah a nuntak theihna dingin na hilh kei leh, tua mipa pen a mawhnei-in si ding a, ahi zongin ama sihna nang kong ngawh ding hi
Nangmah in migilopa khat hilhkhol napi-in a mawh gamtatna a khawl kei leh, tua mipa a mawhnei mahin si ding a, ahi zongin nang na suakta ding hi,” hong ci hi.

Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Amaute in, ‘Ka mawhna uh leh ka khialhnate un hong hencipin ka tha uh beita ahih manin, bangci nuntak zawh ding ka hi uh hiam?’ ci uh hi

Amaute kiangah hih bangin gen in: Kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih mah bangin mawhnei mi khat a si ka muh ciangin nuam ka sa het kei hi. A mawh gamtatna khawlin a nuntak ding ka deih hizaw hi. Israel mite aw, na mawh gamtatnate uh khawl un. Bang hangin si nuam se na hi uh hiam

“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, tu-in Israel mite kiangah hih bangin gen in: Midik khat in mawhna a bawl leh, a beisa-a ama hoihna in amah suaktasak theilo hi. Migilo khat a gitlohna khawl leh gim kipialo ding a, midik khat in mawhna bawl leh nungtasuak tuanlo ding hi
Midik khat tungah nuntakna ding kam ka ciam hangin, a beisa-a ama hoihna suangin mawh gamtat ding hong kipan leh, ama gamtat hoihnasate ka phawk kei ding hi. Ama mawh gamtatna hangin si veve ding hi
Migilo khat kiangah, na si taktak ding hi, ci-in ka hilhkholh hangin, a mawh gamtatna khawlin a man a hoihin hong gamtakik hen la

gentehna-in, leitawi lapa in ama tungah a ap khapna vante pia kikin, a guksa nate pia kikin, a mawh bawlnate khawlin, nuntakna a pia thei thukhamte a zuih leh, amah nungta taktak ding a, si hetlo ding hi
Ama gamtatnasa mawhnate kimaisak ding hi. A man a hoihin amah gamta ahih manin nungta ding hi
“Ahi zongin na mipihte in, ‘ Topa' hihna zia thutanglo hi,’ ci-in ngaihsun uh hi. Tua bang hilozaw a, amau' ngaihsutna zia a manlohna hang hizaw hi
Mihoih khat in a gamtat hoih khawlin gamtatsiat ding hong kipan leh, tua a gamtatsiatna hangin amah si ding hi
Migilo khat in a gitlohna khawlin a man a hoihin gamta leh, tua thu hangin amah suakta ding hi
Ahi zongin Israel mite in keima hihna zia a thutang loin a gen uh hi. Keimah in amaute' gamtatna tawh kizui-in thu a khen ding ka hi bek hi,” hong ci hi.
Salin ka omzawh uh a kum sawmlenih kum, a kha sawmna a ni masa ni-in Jerusalem panin a hong suakta mi khat kei kiangah hong pai-in, “Jerusalem khuapi kila khinta hi,” ci-in thu hong ko hi
Tua ama hong tun' ni ding a zan nitakin Topa' vangliatna ka sungah hong omlam ka kiphawk a, tua mipa hong tun' ni zingsangin Topa in kei hong pau theisak kik hi
Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a
“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel gam khuapi siate sungah a teng mite in, ‘Abraham, mi khat bek hinapi-in gambup kipia hi. Tu-in eite a tampi ihih ciangin hih gam pen eima-a' hi taktak hi,’ ci uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen, hih bangin amaute kiangah gen in: Note in sasi, a sa tawh na nekhawm uh a, milim zong na bia uh hi. Mi zong na that lai uh hi. Tua ahih manin bangci-in hih gam pen kote-a' hi, ci thei na hi uh hiam
Note in namsau suan'in na nei uh a, na gamtatnate uh kihhuai mahmah hi. Mi khempeuh in nulepa mawhna na gamta uh hi. Tua bangpi-in hih gam luah thei ding na hi uh hiam, ci-in gen in

Amaute kiangah hih bangin gen in: Kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih mah bangin, khuapi siate sungah a teng mite galin si ding uh a, khuaneu-ah a teng mite khempeuh gamsate in ne ding uh hi. Dum muan'huai sung leh leihawm sungah a bute khempeuh zong pulnatna tawh si veve ding uh hi
Gamsung khempeuh gamkhing ka suaksak ding a, amaute' kisaktheihpih vangliatna teng bei ding hi. Israel mualtungte gamkhing suak ding ahih manin kuamah in kantan ngamlo ding uh hi
A mawhna hangun a mite gim pia-in, a gam uh gamkhing ka suahsak ciangin Topa ka hihna thu hong thei ding uh hi

“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, khuapi kulh gei-ah ahi a, a inn kong gei uhah ahi zongin na mipihte a kimuh uh ciangin nangma thu tawh kisai thu gen uh a, ‘Pai un, Topa in bang thu gen hiam, va ngai ni,’ ci-in khatlekhat kizawn uh hi

Tua ciangin nangma thugen a za dingin ka mite hong kisutuah uh a, ahi zongin nangma gen bangin amaute gamtalo uh hi. Amaute a kamun hoih khem napi-in, a lungsim uhah amau' metna ding bek ngaihsun uh hi
Amaute-a' dingin nang pen mite' lungnopna dingin zawl la sa-in lasaknate a tum mipa tawh na kibang lel hi. Na thugen khempeuh hong ngai napi uh, khat beek zuilo uh hi
Ahi zongin a tung takpi ding ahih mah bangin, na thugente a tun' ciangin amaute lakah kamsang khat omngei ahihlam hong thei ding uh hi,” hong ci hi.
